title: S.A.M Item / Weapon
description: Defines a custom item or weapon. S.A.M registers it into the items[] table at a reserved runtime slot (>=5000) and wires up its models, names, category and slot.

id.description: Unique item id in 'namespace:item' form (e.g. 'darkblade:shadowblade'). S.A.M assigns the runtime numeric item slot (>=5000) automatically.

name_unidentified.description: Item name shown before identification (e.g. 'black sword').

category.description: Item category (Barony Category enum, from items.hpp). Governs how the game classifies the item.

slot.description: Equipment slot the item occupies (Barony ItemEquippableSlot enum). Use NO_EQUIP for non-equippable items.

weight.description: Item weight in Barony weight units.

gold_value.description: Base gold value of the item.

level.description: Item level for random-generation curves. -1 excludes the item from random generation.

model.description: Path (relative to the mod folder) to the third-person/world .vox model other players see.

model_fp.description: Path to the first-person .vox model the wielder sees. If omitted, S.A.M falls back to the world model.

icon.description: Path to the 2D inventory icon image for the item.

attributes.description: Named integer attributes/effects for the item (maps to ItemGeneric.attributes). Keys are attribute names, values are integers.

on_hit_effect.description: Status effect applied on a successful hit (e.g. an EFF_ effect name from stat.hpp), used by the effect/plugin system.

on_hit_chance.description: Probability (0.0-1.0) that on_hit_effect triggers on a hit.

stackable.description: Whether multiple copies stack into one inventory slot.

magic_level.description: Magic/enchantment level of the item (affects value and behavior).
